bsky.text: I look for info on the McConnell situation about 5 times a day, because--legitimately--as a mystery writer I have a major interest in how you hide a dead body.

bsky.name: Seth Abramson
bsky.text: Hosting a World Cup as President of the United States and having it end with the entire world somehow hating you even more than the historically unprecedented degree to which they already hated you is quite the accomplishment given that he never laced up even once

bsky.text: If anyone would like to see a short video of a baby Armadillo having a drink of milk, this is your lucky day.

bsky.name: Digital Brain
bsky.text: A 660 ton steel ball just did its job: watch it swing inside Taipei 101 during Taiwan's 7.2 earthquake, canceling out the tower's sway.

bsky.name: Petra Michaela
bsky.text: What some call "unused land" is often the last safe haven for countless living creatures. Wetlands are not empty spaces waiting to be developed. They are nurseries for birds, natural water filters, flood defenses, and wildlife habitats that cannot be replaced once lost.

bsky.name: Portland City Councilor Jamie Dunphy
bsky.text:
Weird to miss the robber barons of yore, but at least Carnegie built libraries. 

He didn't buy the publishing company and threaten to take all the books unless the government built him a better library...

bsky.name: ProPublica
bsky.text:
In case you missed it: Last year, federal authorities were chided for seizing electronic devices from Andrew Tate and his brother in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, and told to return them, records and interviews show.

Experts said the intervention was highly inappropriate.
